ip_outcome_note: Confirmed Metapod via card name, PokemonTCG.io API (swsh2-2, National Pokedex no. 11, Stage 1 evolves from Caterpie), artist Asako Ito, and canonical angular green chrysalis design.

trivia_bullets.text: First and only Metapod print in corpus. National Pokedex no. 11, Stage 1 chrysalis form. Evolves from Caterpie at level 7, into Butterfree at level 10 — shortest three-stage span in Generation I.

Ash's Metapod first appeared in Season 1 Episode 3 ('Ash Catches a Pokemon'). The Metapod vs. Metapod Harden standoff in Episode 4 ('Challenge of the Samurai') is one of the franchise's most parodied early moments. Ash's Metapod evolved into Butterfree in that episode — the franchise's first on-screen three-stage evolution sequence.

Flavor text: 'It is waiting for the moment to evolve. At this stage, it can only harden, so it remains motionless to avoid attack.' The card's stillness-forward composition (pale background, suspended cocoon, no environmental action) directly illustrates the flavor text's passivity.

Adaptive Evolution allows turn-one evolution, encoding the lore that Metapod's sole function is becoming Butterfree. 3-retreat-cost 80HP Stage 1 is otherwise non-competitive; the ability is the entire reason to run the line.

related_cards.name: Caterpie
related_cards.note: pre-evolution, adjacent collector number, shares Adaptive Evolution ability
